items.headline: Sixers' Joel Embiid (ankle, hip) to miss Game 2 vs. Knicks
items.description: Philadelphia's standout big man will miss Game 2 because of injuries to his ankle and hip.

items.headline: The Athletic: Josh Hart has ‘the street sweeper' mentality
items.description: Hart remains an example of the street sweeper mindset. He does not need the ball to make an impact, and he understands who he is.

items.headline: The Athletic: How J.B. Bickerstaff transformed the Pistons
items.description: Bickerstaff learned from his father, from years as an assistant and from failure. His goal? To make his players feel "invincible."

items.headline: Starting 5: Thunder roll, Pistons rally to secure Game 1 wins
items.description: Pistons edge Cavs in clutch time, Chet Holmgren stars in win vs. the Lakers and two Game 2s await tonight on ESPN.

items.headline: 3 things to watch in Spurs-Timberwolves Game 2
items.description: Victor Wembanyama's minutes and defensive presence are among the factors to watch in Game 2 of the West semifinals.

items.headline: 3 things to watch in Knicks-Sixers Game 2
items.description: Jalen Brunson's tear continued into Game 1 of the East semis, giving Philadelphia a clear to-do list for Game 2.

items.headline: Masai Ujiri says Mavericks are ready to focus on Cooper Flagg
items.description: Masai Ujiri, the Mavericks' new team president and alternate governor, plans to exude calm and build around Cooper Flagg.

items.headline: Celtics' Jaylen Brown fined $50K for criticizing officials
items.description: Brown made his comments on a livestream on May 3 following the Celtics’ 109-100 loss to the Philadelphia 76ers in Game 7.

items.headline: Recap: Pistons, Thunder open Conference Semifinals with wins
items.description: Check out the the best highlights, stats and observations from Tuesday's action in the 2026 NBA Playoff Conference Semifinals.

items.headline: 4 takeaways: Thunder's bigs balance rare off night for SGA in Game 1 win
items.description: Chet Holmgren delivers an all-around performance and OKC's depth proves too much for the Lakers in the series opener.

items.headline: 4 takeaways: Pistons muscle -- and shoot -- their way to Game 1 win over the Cavs
items.description: Detroit asserts itself in the series opener, turning back Cleveland behind rebounding, defense and 3-point shooting.

items.headline: 2026 NBA Playoffs deliver most-watched 1st round in 33 years
items.description: Game 7 of 76ers-Celtics on May 2 is the most-watched 1st round Game 7 ever, averaging 11 million viewers on NBC/Peacock.

items.headline: Puerto Rico mourns death of basketball icon José 'Piculín' Ortiz
items.description: José “Piculín” Ortiz played parts of two seasons in the NBA, but played in four World Championships and four Olympic Games.

items.headline: Luka Dončić, Jalen Williams ruled out for Game 1 of West semifinals
items.description: Hamstring injuries will keep the Lakers' star guard and the Thunder's standout forward out of the lineup for the series opener.

items.headline: Starting 5: Wolves, Knicks get Game 1 wins; Pair of Game 1s in semis await tonight
items.description: Minnesota steals Game 1 in San Antonio, Jalen Brunson fuels another Knicks outburst and a pair of Game 1s await tonight.
